purpose: CLI subcommand handlers. Each file exports the async function invoked by commander for one subcommand.

files.purpose: Orchestrates the full generate pipeline: load config, scan project, plan chunks, create backend client, run standard or chunked pipeline, and write outputs.

keyFunctions.name: generate
keyFunctions.purpose: Entry point for `lumiko generate`; runs the full pipeline and writes docs + .context/ bundle.

keyFunctions.name: runStandardPipeline
keyFunctions.signature: runStandardPipeline(client: DocGenerator, files: ScannedFile[], config: LumikoConfig, options: GenerateOptions, spinner: Ora): Promise<GeneratedDocs>
keyFunctions.purpose: Single-shot pipeline: calls generateDocs and generateContext directly on all files.

keyFunctions.name: runChunkedPipeline
keyFunctions.signature: runChunkedPipeline(client: DocGenerator, files: ScannedFile[], chunkPlan: ChunkPlan, config: LumikoConfig, options: GenerateOptions, spinner: Ora): Promise<GeneratedDocs>
keyFunctions.purpose: Map-reduce pipeline: analyzes each chunk then synthesizes docs and context bundle from analyses.

keyFunctions.name: estimateTokens
keyFunctions.purpose: Rough token estimate (chars/4 + overhead) used for cost/plan display.

keyFunctions.name: estimateCost
keyFunctions.purpose: Approximate USD cost for the API backend using Sonnet pricing.

files.purpose: Creates `.lumiko/config.yaml` and the `docs/` directory for a new project.

keyFunctions.name: init
keyFunctions.purpose: Scaffolds Lumiko config; exits with a hint if config already exists unless --force is passed.
